creator: r@rfmoz.eu
text:
Created attachment 247803
Patch to upgrade port to Tuptime 5.2.3

Hi,


Tuptime have a new release (5.2.3) and it would be nice to have it on FreeBSD.

Changelog:

  * Update distribution packages
  * Documentation revised
  * Minnor code refactoring


Please, see the attached patch with the PORT upgrade changes.



Thanks,
